dag.dag_name: Customers identity resolution delay cascades into Marketing segmentation

tasks.dependencies: Waits on upstream domain A DAG completion
Waits on upstream domain B DAG completion
Waits on upstream domain C DAG completion
Requires all 3 upstream domains to have completed
Consolidates Pricing data across upstream domains
Compares actual start time to expected upstream-completion time
Branch: no material cascade delay detected
Branch: cascade delay detected, triggers cross-DAG AutoRCA
Notifies stakeholders of cascade impact with root-cause chain

incident.incident_name: Customers identity resolution delay cascades into Marketing segmentation
incident.description: Cascading Delay incident on the Pricing pipeline (RTL_PRC_CASC): customers identity resolution delay cascades into Marketing segmentation.
incident.symptoms: Marketing daily audience-segmentation DAG, dependent on Customer 360 identity resolution, starts 90 minutes late and misses its own campaign-trigger window.
incident.root_cause: Customer 360's identity merge (see LRJ Failure catalogue) failed and had to be manually rerun, and Marketing's segmentation DAG waits on a fixed cross-DAG sensor with no manual-rerun-aware retry logic.
incident.business_impact: A time-sensitive promotional email campaign misses its optimal send window, reducing projected campaign engagement.
incident.resolution: Add a manual-rerun-aware sensor mode that re-evaluates on both scheduled and ad-hoc upstream completions; add a campaign-critical fast-path using cached prior-day segments as fallback.

expected_rca.expected_rca_summary: AI AutoRCA should identify: Customer 360's identity merge (see LRJ Failure catalogue) failed and had to be manually rerun, and Marketing's segmentation DAG waits on a fixed cross-DAG sensor with no manual-rerun-aware retry logic.
expected_rca.evidence_required: Airflow task logs, Datadog infrastructure/application metrics, cross-DAG lineage/dependency graph, JIRA/Confluence RAG context for known-issue matching
expected_rca.airflow_logs: Airflow cross-DAG sensor log shows extended wait matching the manual-rerun timestamp of the upstream DAG
expected_rca.datadog_metrics: Datadog shows Marketing DAG start-time variance directly correlated to Customer 360 DAG completion variance over trailing 30 days
expected_rca.resolution: Add a manual-rerun-aware sensor mode that re-evaluates on both scheduled and ad-hoc upstream completions; add a campaign-critical fast-path using cached prior-day segments as fallback.
expected_rca.preventive_action: Flag launch/campaign-critical downstream DAGs in the metadata model so cascade monitoring applies tighter alert thresholds to them specifically.
